metadata.description: Speak Claude Code activity out loud while you're AFK — per-turn summary and blocker pings via OS-native TTS (no API key required).

plugins.name: readless
plugins.description: Hook-only voice plugin. Speaks the last assistant message on Stop and pings you when Claude is waiting on input. Defaults to free OS voices (macOS say / espeak-ng / Windows SAPI); OpenAI and ElevenLabs supported when a key is set.
